reviews.name: Sarah J.
reviews.text: Absolutely loved the Dragon Roll! The atmosphere was cozy and the staff was incredibly friendly.

reviews.name: Mike T.
reviews.text: Great portions for the price. The Lo Mein could use a bit more seasoning but overall excellent.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Best Sesame Chicken in town. I highly recommend the drive-through if you're in a rush!
